name: bountyverdict
description: Guard public GitHub bounty, agent-harness, CI, and MCP upgrade decisions with evidence-linked x402 checks.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence gates for GitHub coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Preflight public GitHub bounties and agent instructions, diagnose or classify failed Actions runs, audit third-party skills, and gate MCP tool-catalog upgrades with bounded evidence-linked checks.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this public GitHub bounty is worth pursuing.
Diagnose this failed public GitHub Actions run.
Gate this MCP tools/list change before upgrading.
